title: 'Endless fears': Even if fighting stops, the damage to Iran's children will endure
summary_full: The BBC has been able to obtain testimony from parents and those trying to help children deal with the distress that comes with war.
summary_public: The BBC has been able to obtain testimony from parents and those trying to help children deal with the distress that comes with war.
